pi_items.source: setup_task.sh data generation script uses random mashing for sub-99, which results in uniquely high errors. Running the metric computation code confirms sub-99 is the only participant meeting the exclusion criteria.

The task description explicitly states 'Exclude any participant whose TOTAL WSE across all trials is strictly greater than 50'. Execution of the metric logic confirms sub-99 has a total_wse of 103, triggering this rule.
setup_task.sh explicitly writes a CSV header exactly matching these columns during data generation.
The task description instructs the agent to output the JSON report to this exact path, and verifier.py copies from this location.

privileged_info_summary: The Spatial Working Memory (SWM) log data is synthetically generated via setup_task.sh using a fixed seed. Analysis of the data generation and execution of the ground-truth calculation script confirm that 'sub-99' is uniquely generated with random mashing behavior, producing a total WSE of 103, successfully triggering the 'total_wse > 50' contamination exclusion rule. All data columns and the output file path exactly match the task parameters and verifier checks.
